edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }

params.content:
[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
rayon = "1.8"
parking_lot = "0.12"

[profile.release]
lto = "fat"
codegen-units = 1
debug = true
opt-level = 3

[build-dependencies]

params.summary: Optimized exact vector search using AVX-512 intrinsic instructions and Rayon parallelism. The search query uses AVX-512 to significantly speed up L2 distance calculations, processing 16 dimensions per block, which optimally calculates the 128 dimensions in a loop-unrolled manner and accumulates results. Additionally, parallel iterator using chunking speeds up calculations, efficiently taking advantage of multicore processors. Since exact correctness criteria was easily met, focus was completely on maximizing CPU and AVX throughput.

output.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Optimized exact vector search using AVX-512 intrinsic instructions and Rayon parallelism. The search query uses AVX-512 to significantly speed up L2 distance calculations, processing 16 dimensions per block, which optimally calculates the 128 dimensions in a loop-unrolled manner and accumulates results. Additionally, parallel iterator using chunking speeds up calculations, efficiently taking advantage of multicore processors. Since exact correctness criteria was easily met, focus was completely on maximizing CPU and AVX throughput.. Final QPS: 71.42, Recall: 0.9994
